<!-- agent-bridge:managed prompt=agb-claim -->
<!-- Managed by agent-bridge. Regenerated by agent-bridge. Do not edit below; -->
<!-- edits are replaced on the next scaffold/upgrade. Your own prompts in this -->
<!-- directory without the agent-bridge:managed marker are left untouched. -->

Claim Agent Bridge task `$1` for me, then read it.

`$1` is the task id. Run the full path (agb is not on your PATH):

    ~/.agent-bridge/agb claim $1 --agent <agent-id>

`claim` takes `--agent` (not `--actor`). Claiming stops another agent from
doing the same work. After it succeeds, read the body before acting:

    ~/.agent-bridge/agb show $1

`agb show` prints a `file:` path with the full body — read that file, then do
exactly what the task asks. Close it with `/agb-done $1 "<result>"`.
